title: Dale Carnegie
html:
Stub. Author of How to Win Friends and Influence People. Anchor of Yahir's social-skills reading bench, alongside john maxwell.

What we know

  • Six-line distillation captured in 2023 08 29 thoughts and principle from dale carnegie — find what makes someone feel important; remember names; be a good listener; encourage others to talk about themselves.
  • The Carnegie principles are the operating frame behind Yahir's piercing prompts practice and his Rankett meetup pitch tactics.
